# CWE-829: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere
lang: go
file: CWE-829-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"plugin"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Vulnerable: loads a shared object from a user-supplied filesystem path.
func LoadExtension(c *gin.Context) {
	path := c.Query("module_path")
	p, err := plugin.Open(path)
	if err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusBadRequest, err.Error())
		return
	}
	sym, err := p.Lookup("Init")
	if err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusBadRequest, err.Error())
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"loaded": sym != nil})
}
